title: Glyphs: File Actions
text: Glyphs: File Actions Refer to the following table to understand the Uniface file action glyphs that might display. Table 1. Uniface Glyphs: File Actions (All images are 16x16 pixels) Glyph Glyph Name New u8_cprcnew u9_dianew u8_inclnew u8_mesgnew u8_xmlnew u8_xsltnew Open u8_apsopen u8_bomopen u8_cmpopen u9_diaopen u8_libopen u8_menuopen u8_xmlopen u8_xsltopen Save u_store u8_apsstore u8_bomstore u8_cmpstore u8_cprcstore u9_diastore u8_fldtstore u8_inclstore u8_menustore u8_mesgstore u8_xmlsave u8_xmlsaveresult u8_xsltsave Duplicate u8_cmpduplicate u8_cprcduplicate u9_diaduplicate u8_inclduplicate u8_mesgduplicate Cut, Copy, Paste, Print u_rem_select u_save u8_cmppaste u_ins_select u_print Was this topic helpful?
